Home / Shop / Pro Locker

Pro

Enlarge Image

Pro Locker – 24" Wide, 76 Inches High, 19 Inches Deep

Model # PRO-24-MP

Lead time: quick ship in one month (24" or 30" widths, one signature color) · Custom-built in three months

$599.00
19" (standard)
24" (standard)

View All Color Options PDF

Select add-ons to update price

Standard size shown: 24" W x 76" H x 19" D

Base: optional 4" high base can be added

Weight: approx. 175 lbs

Volume Discounts

Quantity Price
50 + lockers 3–5% discount – Contact us for pricing

Pro Wood Locker – Features & Options

Features

  • MPW-6C plywood core with premium melamine surface for a furniture-grade look
  • High scratch resistance and impact durability; moisture-resistant, dimensionally stable
  • Engineered for high-traffic athletic locker rooms
  • 14" high foot locker provides comfortable seating and secure equipment storage
  • Available in 18" to 30" widths; standard configuration 24" W x 76" H x 19" D with optional 4" base
  • 5 year warranty

Options

  • Vented front panel for increased airflow
  • Secure lock box integrated into the upper compartment
  • Bottom cushion or both cushions for added seating comfort
  • Skate hooks for hockey or figure skating storage
  • Custom logo option for teams or programs (custom orders only)
  • Name plate and additional gear hooks

Downloads

  • All Color Options PDF
  • Laminate Colors PDF
  • Woodgrain Colors PDF
  • Phenolic Colors PDF
  • Request spec sheet & quote
  • Installation support
  • View all lockers

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.
